original_sql_excerpt: MERGE INTO CCAL_REPL_OWNER.J$AVY_FACT J$AVY_FACT USING (SELECT J$AVY_FACT.ROWID ROW_REF, J$AVY_FACT.TXN_ID, J$AVY_FACT.JRN_DATE, DECODE((ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY J$AVY_FACT.TXN_ID ORDER BY J$AVY_FACT.JRN_DATE DESC, J$AVY_FACT.NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS DESC)) , 1, 'Y', 'D') AS REF_JRN_CONSUMED, CASE WHEN J$AVY_FACT.JRN_DATE <= MRK_DT.TRGT_CMMT_TMS THEN MRK_DT.BATCH_DT ELSE CAL.NBD END AS NBD FROM <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?>.J$AVY_FACT, ( SELECT SSDS_MRKR_CONFIG.SRC_STM_ID, SSDS_MRKR_CONFIG.MRKR_NM, MAX(CDS_MRKR_LOG.BTCH_DT) BATCH_DT, MAX(CDS_MRKR_LOG.TRGT_CMMT_TMS) TRGT_CMMT_TMS FROM <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("SSDS_UTIL_OWNER", "D") ?>.CDS_MRKR_LOG, <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("SSDS_UTIL_OWNER", "D") ?>.SSDS_MRKR_CONFIG WHERE MRKR_TP_NM = 'AVY' AND CDS_MRKR_LOG.MRKR_NM = SSDS_MRKR_CONFIG.MRKR_NM AND CDS_MRKR_LOG.PCS_F = 'Y' GROUP BY SSDS_MRKR_CONFIG.SRC_STM_ID, SSDS_MRKR_CONFIG.MRKR_NM ) MRK_DT, (SELECT CAL_DT, LEAD(CAL_DT) OVER (ORDER BY CAL_DT) NBD FROM <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("COMMON_OWNER", "D") ?>.DATE_DIM , <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("SSDS_UTIL_OWNER", "D") ?>.APPLICATION_PROPERTY a WHERE DATE_DIM.BUS_DY_FLAG='Y' AND (a.APPLICATION_PROPERTY_NAME='AVY_BACTH_DATE_HIST' AND a.APPLICATION_PROPERTY_VALUE='N') ) CAL WHERE J$AVY_FACT.JRN_SUBSCRIBER= :GLOBAL.MONITOR_SUBCRIBER_NAME AND J$AVY_FACT.THREAD_NO = :GLOBAL.GV_RT_THRD_NO AND J$AVY_FACT.JRN_CONSUMED = 'Y' AND NVL(J$AVY_FACT.NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS,0) < :GLOBAL.GV_RT_NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS AND J$AVY_FACT.SRC_STM_ID = MRK_DT.SRC_STM_ID(+) AND MRK_DT.BATCH_DT = CAL.CAL_DT(+) ORDER BY J$AVY_FACT.JRN_DATE,J$AVY_FACT.NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS DESC FETCH FIRST :GLOBAL.MONITOR_RECORDS_PER_THREAD ROWS ONLY ) MERGE_QUERY ON (J$AVY_FACT.TXN_ID = MERGE_QUERY.TXN_ID AND J$AVY_FACT.ROWID = MERGE_QUERY.ROW_REF ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET J$AVY_FACT.JRN_CONSUMED = MERGE_QUERY.REF_JRN_CONSUMED, J$AVY_FACT.BATCH_DT = MERGE_QUERY.NBD

original_sql_excerpt: BEGIN -- Log activity into avy_fact_log table for publishing to lighthouse INSERT INTO <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("TRANSACTIONS_OWNER", "D") ?>.AVY_FACT_LOG ( TXN_ID, JRN_FLAG, CRT_DTM, CRT_USR_NM, LAST_UDT_DTM, LAST_UDT_USR_NM ) select TXN_ID, JRN_FLAG, sysdate, '<?=odiRef.getSession("SESS_NAME") ?>', sysdate, '<?=odiRef.getSession("SESS_NAME") ?>' FROM <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?>.J$AVY_FACT where JRN_SUBSCRIBER=:GLOBAL.MONITOR_SUBCRIBER_NAME and THREAD_NO= :GLOBAL.GV_RT_THRD_NO AND NVL(NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS,0) < :GLOBAL.GV_RT_NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS AND JRN_CONSUMED IN( 'Y','D') AND JRN_FLAG in ('I','U'); DELETE FROM <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?>.J$AVY_FACT where JRN_SUBSCRIBER=:GLOBAL.MONITOR_SUBCRIBER_NAME AND THREAD_NO= :GLOBAL.GV_RT_THRD_NO AND JRN_CONSUMED = 'D' AND NVL(NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS,0) < :GLOBAL.GV_RT_NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS; END;
